overall.description: A static cinematic shot of the Gryffindor common room from a Harry Potter video game, featuring warm firelight illuminating medieval gothic architecture with red tapestries and wooden beams. Students in wizard robes periodically walk through the cozy lounge area while others relax on the foreground couch.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with central fireplace and lounge seating

agents.ego_description: standing still in the common room observing the environment and passing students

notable_agents.action: student in black wizard robes walking from right to left across the foreground at approximately 6 seconds
two students sitting on the red leather couch conversing throughout the clip

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire serving as the room's focal point and light source
wall covered in red fabric tapestries with gold embroidery and hanging banners
red leather sofa with students sitting in the foreground left
hanging iron chandelier with multiple candles providing warm overhead light
upper level wooden balcony with railings overlooking the common room
landscape painting in gold frame hanging on the tapestry wall
green-shaded floor lamp next to the armchair providing ambient light
upholstered armchair with wooden legs positioned by the wall
climbing green ivy decorating the stone wall near the painting

segments.scene_description: A static view of the Gryffindor common room featuring a central stone fireplace with a warm fire, red tapestries adorning the walls, and wooden gothic architecture. Two students sit conversing on a red leather couch in the foreground while other students in wizard robes periodically walk through the room from right to left. The lighting is warm and atmospheric, primarily from the fireplace and hanging chandeliers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of the Gryffindor common room, capturing a moment of quiet activity within the warm, medieval space. It begins with a focus on the central stone fireplace, where a glowing fire casts a soft light across red tapestries and heavy wooden gothic beams. As the scene unfolds, the warm illumination from the hearth and hanging chandeliers highlights two students conversing on a red leather couch in the foreground. The composition remains steady as other students in wizard robes periodically drift through the lounge from right to left, blending into the cozy, lived-in environment.
